name: Ladyfinger Pudding with Coffee Cream
recipeIngredient: 12 oz fat-free cream cheese, room temperature
1 tub frozen light whipped topping, thawed (8oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the ladyfingers in a single layer on waxed paper.
2. Sprinkle with half of the coffee.
3. Stand the cookies upright and place them against the sides of a 2-quart souffle dish or other large dessert dish, cutting to fit. Use smaller pieces to cover the bottom of the dish.
4. In a small bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, remaining coffee, and vanilla until smooth.
5. Transfer the mixture to a larger bowl and fold in the whipped topping until fully blended.
6. Pour the mixture into the souffle dish with the ladyfingers.
7. Cover with plastic wrap.
8. Refrigerate for 2-12 hours.
9. Just before serving, sprinkle cocoa powder through a wire sieve over top of the pudding.
